allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./messages/ru.json'\); require\('./messages/en.json'\); require\('./messages/zh.json'\); require\('./messages/hi.json'\); console.log\('All JSON valid'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(p.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
